description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Crowdin Translation Integration that runs on a scheduled basis, specifically every Friday at 10:15 PM UTC. The workflow should use an ubuntu-latest job to set up Java 18 and Python 3.10, then check out the repository with a personal access token. It should download translations from Crowdin using a Python script and a provided API key, recreate a specific header file, commit the changes, and push them back to the repository.
